# **Self-Drive Hire - Open 5 Days a Week**

[Book Now](https://btcvehiclerental.securewebbookings.com/) [Opening Hours](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/contact-us) [Get your licence check code](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/get-your-licence-check-code)

## Reserve a vehicle today

Select from one of our wide range of adaptable and quality vehicles using our easy to use, hassle free booking system.

Proweb

[![car](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/images/module_images/cars.jpg)](https://btcvehiclerental.securewebbookings.com/)

## [Cars](https://btcvehiclerental.securewebbookings.com/)

At BTC we offer a wide range of cars to hire from small run-arounds to executive cars and people carriers.

[Rent a Car](https://btcvehiclerental.securewebbookings.com/)

[![vans](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/images/module_images/vans.jpg)](https://btcvehiclerental.securewebbookings.com/)

## [Vans](https://btcvehiclerental.securewebbookings.com/)

We also offer a large selection of vans, from the car-derived Peugeot Partner right up to a Luton with tail lift.

[Rent a Van](https://btcvehiclerental.securewebbookings.com/)

## Why Choose Us?

Our philosophy is to provide you with quality vehicles and excellent customer service at competitive rates. We value your business and want you to come back to us again and again.

![](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/images/module_images/pound.svg)

### Mileage Allowance

125 miles/day

0.20p/mile over allotted miles

![](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/images/module_images/calendar.svg)

### 5 Days a Week

We are open for business 5 days a week! This means that we can be very flexible with rental periods to suit your needs.

![](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/images/module_images/production.svg)

### Film Production

We offer flexible short or long term hire on our vehicles. Free delivery & collection from all London film studios.

![](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/images/module_images/car.svg)

### Large Range of Vehicles

Large range of cars, vans, tail-lifts, people carriers and executive cars to chose from

![](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/images/module_images/Parking_Icon_Dark_Grey.svg)

### Customer parking

We have ample on-site parking for our customers, for more information please get in touch.

![](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/images/module_images/Tow_Bar_White.svg)

### Tow Bars

We offer a variety of vehicles that come complete with tow bars.

[Explore](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/about-us)

# BTC Berkshire Van and Car Hire \| Self Drive Minibus Rentals \| Reading, Bracknell, Wokingham, Earley

### "They always have the best range of cars and vans"

BTC are a great company! Lovely people and nothing is never too much trouble. They always have the best range of cars and vans available. Highly recommend.

_**Charlotte Michel** \- Google Reviews_

### "Will use again should the need arise"

I needed to hire a car a short notice when my own car developed a fault. They were able to supply me a vehicle even though I hadn't pre booked and were very flexible regarding length of hire as I was unsure when my vehicle would be back on the road. Excellent friendly service. Will use again should the need arise. Very pleased.

_**Richard Clarke** \- Google Reviews_

### "Top Class Service"

If I could give them 10 stars I would. Top class service. No hassle at all. Service felt personal and not "corporate hire companies" like. The owner is a top lad and was very easy going. The opportunity to pet the office cat Oscar is an added bonus too! Will definitely use BTC if a hire vehicle is ever needed!

### Frequently Asked

### Questions

We appreciate you may have some further questions for us regarding how our process works, please let us know if you have any further questions.

### What do your prices include?

Prices quoted are inclusive of VAT, insurance and breakdown cover.

### Can I hire a vehicle if I have points on my licence?

Depending on the nature of offence and driver age, please call us for details.

### Can I take your vehicle overseas?

Unfortunately we do not allow our vehicles out of the country.

### Can I drop the vehicle back out of hours?

No, we do not have drop off facilities, all vehicles need to be returned within our opening times.

[More FAQs](https://www.btcvehiclerentals.co.uk/faqs)
